channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Toyota moves Tacoma production from Mexico to Texas in $3.6 billion shift
item.description: Toyota announced it will relocate most of its mid-size Tacoma pickup truck production from Mexico to the U.S. as part of a $3.6 billion investment.

item.title: Watch: AI-generated actress Tilly Norwood to star in feature film debut
item.description: Particle 6, an AI-powered content studio, announced that the AI creation will appear in the film 'Misaligned.'

item.title: Mother who claimed toddlers died after vaccinations indicted for murder
item.description: Andrea Shaw was indicted by a grand jury on two counts of first-degree murder in the deaths of her 18-month-old twins.

item.title: Explosions reported in Damascus during Macron's Syria visit, state media says
item.description: Macron is the first major Western leader to visit Syria since the fall of former President Bashar al-Assad in December 2024.
